hero.titleHtml:
India की अजीब Laws &
Civic Sense की बातें
hero.subtitle: Did you know spitting on a public street is illegal in most Indian cities? Discover hilarious, shocking, and surprisingly real laws that every Indian should know — but probably doesn't.

quizTeaser.title: Civic IQ Quiz
quizTeaser.description: How much do you really know about India's civic rules?
quizTeaser.body: Take the full Civic IQ Quiz on a dedicated page — 8 questions, instant feedback, and a score you can share with friends.
